recommendations.title: I Believe in Santa
recommendations.overview: Lisa thinks she's finally met the man of her dreams until she finds out he still believes in Santa Claus.

recommendations.title: American History X

recommendations.title: Need for Speed

recommendations.title: One Fast Move

recommendations.title: Warrior
recommendations.overview: The youngest son of an alcoholic former boxer returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament – a path that puts the fighter on a collision course with his estranged, older brother.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.
